name: brightdata-mcp
title: Bright Data MCP
summary: Search, scrape, and extract live web data with automatic bot and CAPTCHA bypass.
description: Give agents real-time access to public web data. Run web searches, scrape any page as clean markdown, pull structured data from 40+ sites like Amazon and LinkedIn, and drive a remote browser. Bot detection and CAPTCHAs are handled for you.

useCases.name: Web search
useCases.description: Query Google, Bing, or Yandex and return SERP results with URLs and snippets for agents to act on.

useCases.name: Web fetch
useCases.description: Fetch any URL as clean markdown or HTML, getting past bot detection and CAPTCHAs.

useCases.name: Structured data
useCases.description: Pull ready-to-use JSON from 40+ platforms including Amazon, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

useCases.name: Browser automation
useCases.description: Control a remote browser to navigate, click, and extract content from dynamic, JavaScript-heavy sites.

brightDataBearerAuth.description: Authenticate with Bright Data using your API token.
